versions.version_description: Added the jazzy colors to all chords. Made this tab as close to the original recording.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: It Never Rains In Southern California
Got My Mind Set On You

content:
Intro - [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Over by the window[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
There´s a pack of cigarettes[/tab]
G#4/7            G#7
Not my brand you understand
   C#m4/7             C#m
Sometimes the girl forgets
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
She forgot to hide them[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I know who left those smokes behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
She´ll say oh he´s just a friend[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
And I´ll say oh [/tab]
        G#4/7 G#7 F#m
I´m not blind to him
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
him him[/tab]

CHORUS
[tab] [ch]B7[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
What´s she´s gonna do about him[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]D7+[/ch]
She´s gonna have to do without him[/tab]
B4/7          A
Or do without me
G#4/7 F#m
Me me
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
No one gets to get it for free[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]
It´s me or it´s him[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Don´t know what he looks like[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Don´t know who he is[/tab]
G#4/7               G#7
Don´t know why she thought that I
      C#m4/7             C#m
would say what´s mine is his
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
I don´t want to own her[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
But I can´t her let it both ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Three is one to many of us[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     G#4/7 [ch]G#7[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
She leaves with me or stays with him[/tab]


CHORUS
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Him him[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
What´s she gonna do about him[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]D7+[/ch]
She´s gonna have to do without him[/tab]
B4/7          A
Or do without me
G#4/7 F#m
Me me
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
No one gets to get it for free[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch]
It´s me or it´s him[/tab]


VOCAL BRIDGE - [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  G#4/7  [ch]G#7[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
If she wants him she can have him[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
Just exactly how we once were[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
It´s goodbye to he and I[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]              G#4/7 [ch]G#7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
and back to me and her without him[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
him him[/tab]

CHORUS
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
What´s she gonna do about him[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]D7+[/ch]
She´ll gonna have to do without him [/tab]
B4/7          A
or do without me
G#4/7 F#m
Me me
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
No one gets to get it for free[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]D7+[/ch]
Time for me to make the girl see[/tab]
B4/7            A
It´s me or it´s him
G#4/7  F#m
Him him
[tab] [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
What´s she gonna do about him .... (repeat and fade)[/tab]


Finally, a nice song with some tricky details. 
Reinaldo - São Paulo - Brazil - 12/10/08.
